versions.version_description: This is how I play the song in my shot, I think it sounds good in Double Drop D tuning.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
( ) = Backing vocals.

[Intro]
|[ch]D[/ch]     |[ch]D[/ch]     |[ch]D[/ch]     |[ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch] |[ch]Bm[/ch]    |

[Chorus]
[tab]N.C.       [ch]D[/ch]
This ain't Texas (Woo), ain't no hold 'em (Hey)[/tab]

So lay your cards down, down, down, down
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
So park your Lexus (Woo) and throw your keys up (Hey)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
Stick around, 'round, 'round, 'round, 'round (Stick around)[/tab]

[Post-Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]
And I'll be damned if I can't slow dance witchu[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]
Come pour some sugar on me, honey too[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
It's a real life boogie and a real life hoedown[/tab]
                       N.C.
Don't be a bitch, come take it to the floor now (Woo, ha)

[Verse 1]
[tab]N.C.            [ch]D[/ch]
   There's a tornado (There's a tornado) in my city (In my city)[/tab]

Hit the basement (Hit the basement), that shit ain't pretty (Shit ain't pretty)
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
Rugged whiskey (Rugged whiskey) 'cause we survivin' ('Cause we survivin')[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
Off red cup kisses, sweet redemption, passin' time, yeah[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
Woo-oo-oo-oo, one step to the right[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]
We headed to the dive bar we always thought was nice[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Woo-oo-oo-oo, run me to the left[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
Then spin me in the middle, boy, I can't read your mind[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]N.C.       [ch]D[/ch]
This ain't Texas (Woo), ain't no hold 'em (Hey)[/tab]

So lay your cards down, down, down, down
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
So park your Lexus (Woo) and throw your keys up (Hey)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
Stick around, 'round, 'round, 'round, 'round (Stick around)[/tab]

[Post-Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]
And I'll be damned if I can't slow dance witchu[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]
Come pour some sugar on me, honey too[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
It's a real life boogie and a real life hoedown[/tab]
                       N.C.
Don't be a bitch, come take it to the floor now (Woo)

[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]
And I'll be damned if I cannot dance witchu[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]
Come pour some liquor on me, honey too[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
It's a real life boogie and a real life hoedown[/tab]
                       N.C.
Don't be a bitch, come take it to the floor now (Woo)

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
            Woo-hoo[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
            Woo-hoo[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G7[/ch]
            Woo-hoo[/tab]
[ch]D[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab]N.C.      [ch]D[/ch]
There's a heatwave (There's a heatwave) coming at us (Coming at us)[/tab]

Too hot to think straight (Too hot to think straight), too cold to panic (Too cold to panic)
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
All of the problems just feel dramatic (Just feel dramatic)[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
Now we're runnin' to the first bar that we find, yeah[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
Woo-oo-oo-oo, one step to the right[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]
We headed to the dive bar we always thought was nice[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Woo-oo-oo-oo, you run to the left[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
Just work me in the middle boy, I can't read your mind[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]N.C.       [ch]D[/ch]
This ain't Texas (Woo), ain't no hold 'em (Hey)[/tab]

So lay your cards down, down, down, down
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
So park your Lexus (Woo) and throw your keys up (Hey)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
Stick around, 'round, 'round, 'round, 'round (Stick around)[/tab]

[Post-Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]
And I'll be damned if I cannot dance witchu[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]
Come pour some sugar on me, honey too[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
It's a real life boogie and a real life hoedown[/tab]
                       N.C.
Don't be a bitch, come take it to the floor now (Woo)

[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
I'll be damned if I cannot dance witchu[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]
Come pour some liquor on me, honey too[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
It's a real life boogie and a real life hoedown[/tab]
[tab]                 N.C.                      [ch]Bm[/ch]
Don't be a, come take it to the floor now (ooh)[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                               [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]
      Take it to the floor now, ooh (Hoops, spurs, boots)[/tab]

To the floor now,
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch]
Ooh, ooh,  ooh,  ooh[/tab]
    (Tuck, back, oops,      shoot)
[tab]                               [ch]Bm[/ch]
Come take it to the floor now, ooh[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]
And I'll be damned if I cannot dance with you-oo[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em7[/ch]                              [ch]Bm[/ch]
Baby, pour that sugar and liquor on me too[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch] N.C.
(Furs, spurs, boots, solargenic, photogenic, shoot)[/tab]
